name: Threads

unions.name: Procedure
unions.comment:
Procedures to be processed in a thread.

  - shared: Shared memory
  - global: Global events
  - local: Local events that only affect on the forked thread itself

aliases.name: Program
aliases.type: Platform.Program flags (Threads.Model shared global local) (Threads.Msg global local)

values.name: application
values.type: { init : shared, procedure : flags -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> Threads.Procedure shared global local, view : shared -> Threads.Document global, subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global, onUrlRequest : Browser.UrlRequest -> global, onUrlChange : Url.Url -> global } -> Threads.Program flags shared global local

values.name: await
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that awaits the local events for the thread.

If it returns `Nothing`, it awaits again.
Otherwise, it evaluates the given `Procedure`.
values.type: (local -> shared -> Maybe.Maybe (Threads.Procedure shared global local)) -> Threads.Procedure shared global local

values.name: awaitGlobal
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that awaits global events.

If it returns `Nothing`, it awaits again.
Otherwise, it evaluates the given `Procedure`.
values.type: (global -> shared -> Maybe.Maybe (Threads.Procedure shared global local)) -> Threads.Procedure shared global local

values.name: batch
values.comment: Batch `Procedure`s together. The elements are evaluated in order.
values.type: List.List (Threads.Procedure shared global local) -> Threads.Procedure shared global local

values.name: document
values.type: { init : shared, procedure : flags -> Threads.Procedure shared global local, view : shared -> Threads.Document global, subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global } -> Threads.Program flags shared global local

values.name: documentView
values.type: (shared -> Threads.Document global) -> Threads.Model shared global local -> Threads.Document (Threads.Msg global local)

values.name: element
values.type: { init : shared, procedure : flags -> Threads.Procedure shared global local, view : shared -> Html.Html global, subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global } -> Threads.Program flags shared global local

values.name: elementView
values.type: (shared -> Html.Html global) -> Threads.Model shared global local -> Html.Html (Threads.Msg global local)

values.name: fork
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that evaluates the given `Procedure` in a forked thread.

The forked thread runs independently of the original thread.
i.e., The subsequent `Procedure`s in the original thread are evaluated immediately.
values.type: (() -> Threads.Procedure shared global local) -> Threads.Procedure shared global local

values.name: init
values.type: shared -> Threads.Procedure shared global local -> ( Threads.Model shared global local, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Threads.Msg global local) )

values.name: modify
values.comment: Construct a `Procedure` instance that modifies shared memory state.

values.name: none
values.comment: Construct a `Procedure` instance that do nothing.

values.name: push
values.comment: Construct a `Procedure` instance that pushes a local `Cmd`.
values.type: (shared -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd local) -> Threads.Procedure shared global local

values.name: quit
values.comment:
Quit the thread immediately.

Subsequent `Procedures` are not evaluated and are discarded.

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: (shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub global) -> Threads.Model shared global local -> Platform.Sub.Sub (Threads.Msg global local)

values.name: syncAll
values.comment:
Construct a `Procedure` instance that wait for all given `Procedure`s to be completed.

Given `Procedure`s are evaluated in the independent thread, but the subsequent `Procedure`s in the original thread are **not** evaluated immediately.
values.type: List.List (Threads.Procedure shared global local) -> Threads.Procedure shared global local

values.name: update
values.type: Threads.Msg global local -> Threads.Model shared global local -> ( Threads.Model shared global local, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Threads.Msg global local) )
